TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Kowa'śú®Áďú == O kalokowa' i TaywanśúČťóúŚŹįÁĀ£śú®Áďú O kowa' hananay itini i Taywan ,o kananaman to no mita ami kakaen, pangangan sako tiriday to ngangan i "Carica papaya" hananay, adihayay ko ngangan no kowa' to masamaamaa:nay , sowal sa ko mafana'ay ami kinkiway to kowa' i , oka lalaylay no kowa' i, I'ayaw aitiniay i timolay fa^detay Amirika saan, aitini i 17seci(17šłĖÁīÄ) ami salingato a mapalakat ami lalad tayra i Intoay a kanatar, dodosato a tayniay to i Yacotalo ato itini i fa^detay a kalo-niaro, ano itini to i Inni aca i Filipin ato Taywan , o sowal no mafana'ay to tilid a tamdaw i Taywan i, 'ayaw no 1685 a mihecaan i, ilaay to ama tilid ko pakayniay i kowa' sanay, sanaw matafesiway to ko 300 a mihecaan ko kowa' a ma lengaw itini i Taywan. Likosato adihay to koka pifalic ami saloma to sapaloma to kowa' , fangcalay to palomaen halakamkamay to ama rengaw , nga'ayay to a misamihecahecaan a paloma ato ciheci, sanaw itini to kosakaadihay no kowa' ama rennak, itiya sato ama polong tayra icowacowa no pala i Taywan, ano dodoen ko tilid to 2017 a mihecaan i, o polong ama palomaay to kowa' a sela i, pakaalaay to 2,563 Kongcin ko mapalomaay to kowa' , ato ira ko 125,521 Konton koka adihay no kaleteng no kowa', oranag a taynong 2 ko saadihayay ami palomaan. Masamaanay ko kowa'. śúČťóúśú®ÁďúÁöĄśú¨Ť≥™ O kowa' hananay i, matiya o kilang ko pisa'osi cilaan, sa'ayaw i naitiraay i fa^detay tono Amilika a kanatar ami salingato a masadak, dodosato itini i 'ayaw no mihecaan i naitini i Tayliok ama pacomod a tayni i Taywan , nawhani lahodayay fangcalay paloma^en, kalamkamay a mato'as, halafingnay a ci heci, kalaheciay sanaw olahay saan ko tamtamdaw ami papaloma to kowa', marao-fangcalay a kakaenen, hatilaay ko olah no tamdaw ami papaloma. Lomasato kala iyofongay adihayay ko tanpayce ato cefang ato tang aca o kangoce ato vitamin nila, mipadangay to fitoka ami ilang to kakaenen, so'linay kokafangcal no kowa' saan. Nikaolira o kowa' hananay i, iraay ko kasasiloma nira, iraay ko fafahian a kowa' iraay ko fa'inayan ato matatekoay to fafahian ato fa'inayan a kowa', o fafahian a kowa' i mato'as cira cifaloay ci hanaay, likorsato malofic ko heci nira, yama tatekoay to fa'inayan ato fafahian a kowa' i, hatiyaay to aci falo to hana tiya ciheci cira, 'edeng sa o fa'inayan a kowa' i, o kacihana nira caay ka ciheci cira, sanaw iraay ko pipararamod to kowa' tiya malofac kalaheci ko kowa', sanaw imatini adihayay kopi sanga' to sapaloma to kowa' ira ko lessen ato sulo 1. ,Taynong1.2.3. 5.(ŚŹįŤĺ≤1,2,3,5Ťôü), hananay. Samaeneng ami paloma to kowa'.Ť¶ĀŚ¶āšĹēÁ®ģś§ćśú®Áďú. 1. O pisasapal to sapaloma: Tala'ayaw nopipalomaan i, mili'ayaw ho ami sasapar, o tadafongcal apipalomaan i, itira i likor no kafaliyosan, tiya caay kakalian no faliyas ko rengaw nira, aratek itini i sakasiwa tangasa i cecey polo' irako cecay a foladan no mihecaan, tahpoen to fayfay to sapidipotaw to rengaw nira tiya caay ko kali'ang no fao, ma^deng tangasa i sakatosa a mihecaan to saka lima a foladan, ma^deng to ko to'as nira, o pisakilacan to ami paloma. 2. Misongira ami paloma: Mikangkang ami songira' to pi palomaan a omah, mifolasiw ami patay to rengos, misa'apolaw to sota' ami saloislois, irako todongay o kalomakatan no nanom, mahelek tohaw i, mihacecacecay to ami patatodong to la^ed ami paloma, o cecay no la^ed nira i, ma^eng 2-2.5 no kongciw , ano nga'ayay i saliwangliwangeng ami paloma, tiya matatodong ko la^ed nira, fangcal koka to'as nira , fangcal kopi palangla ato mitaliyok ami 'adiper to sakacaaw ka iyof no tatiihay fali. 3. Mipiloh ami paloma: Nawhani takalaway ko lengaw no kowa', ano caay ka pilohen i, caay ka lawis ko heci nira a siwkaken, sanaw ano matatodong ko to'as nira i, pilohen to mamang ato pasota'en ko tapangan nira tosaka tanektek no rengaw nira, maraod ko tosa a folad, miliyaw haca to sakatosa apipiloh tosaka po^enel nira, ato pasota' haca to tapangan tosaka tanektek no lengaw nira, ano ga'ayay i tahepoen to falaysay to saka'ecaaw ka ci fao nira. 4. O pisolimed to laloma' no omah: Ano caay ka solimeden ko laloma' no pipalomaan to kowa' i, mili'ayaw ko semod ato lengos ami kalingan to lengaw no kowa', sanaw saliyaliyawen ami solimed ko laloma' no omah, ato mipatatodong to cepa' no sota' , tiya fangcal to ko lengaw nira, tiya malofic to koka ciheci nira. 5. Mipitpit to tatiihay a ca'ang no kowa': Yamato'as to ko kowa' i, iraay ko kacica'ang nira to caay kafangcal a ca'ang, o lanang i awaay ko ^epoc to to'as no kowa' , sanaw padpacen ami pitpit ko hatiraay a ca'ang nira. 6. O pipalalamod to hana o kowa': Malawod koka cihanaan no kowa' i, iraay ami lawod ko 'acacenal ato 'adipangpang ami lingling to hana no kowa', oranang i omi palalamoday to sakaciheci no kowa', lomasato o mafana'ay oma lalokay a tamdaw i, o no tamdaway ko saka palalamod to kowa', tiya ilaay koka ciheci nola kowa'. 7. Mipatatodong to cepa' no sota': Nawhani ono kacihelangan koka cihecian no kowa', tona tala'ayaw a ciheci ko kowa' i, ilaay ko pi patatodong to cepa' no sota' toka lengawan nira, ano matafesiw to ko 'icang no sota' i, caay kafangcal ko lengaw no kowa', caayay ka fangcal koka ciheci nira, sanaw ano malalid koka pipatatodong to cepa' no kalengawan nira i, iraay to koka fangcal no ka ciheci no kowa'. 8. O pipatayhi to tapangan no kowa': Ano mipaloma to kowa' i, nanomamangan nira, irasaca ko pi poliyaw ato patayhi to rengaw ato to'as no kowa', ilaay kono kowa' atatodong a poliyaw, ma^deng ko to'as no kowa' , ira sahca kopi patatodong ami hacecacecay ami patool to poliyaw to tapangan nira, iraay ko sakacipapah a poliyaw, iraay ko sakaciheci nira a poliyaw, ano mafanna' ami sa'osi to lomi'ad apatool to poliyaw i, o fafangcal ko lengaw ato kaciheci no kowa'. 9. Malarok ami dadimaw to omah: Nawhani takalaway ko lengaw no kowa', sanaw ano caay ka lalid ami dadimaw i, ano tatangan ko fali ami iyof, ranikayay ama piloh ko kowa', sanaw micopi to sacoker, ano irako mapilohay i, tangsolin ami coker, romasato ano ira ko mikali'angay to kowa' a fao, ano o fohet to ano o 'edo to ami kakaen to kaciheci no kowa', tangsolen ami laplap, sanaw ira toko kalalid ami liso to omah no kowa'. O likor to no tayal to kowa'. śú™šĺÜśé®ŚĽ£Ś∑•šĹú Imatini o kowa' i tini i Taywan, o saadihayay ami palomaan i ora "taynong 2" ano masahetoay toya inian a kowa'an i, caay ka ngaay, alatek caay kacakat o 'aca nira, ano alapaloma sa toranan a kowa', nawhani lahodayay facalay palomaen ko hatiraay a kowa', romasato olanan a kowa' i, matatekoay to fa'inayan ato fafahian, sanaw lanikayay a ciheci cingra, nikaolira imatini iraay to koya "Taynong 6 " hananay a spaloma, olanan a fa^lohay a sapaloma, fangcalay ko heci nira , matatodongay ko katata'ang no heci nira, tadafangcalay a misaadihay ami paloma, onianto ko nga'ayay a paloma^en.(Siwkolan Pangcah/'Amis Suman 2024/03/15) TahapinanangŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô: 1. Áē™śú®Áďú(2009-02-24)
S.PHON: == ko~uwa °** == o~u ka…ĺo~uko~uwa ° i tajwan****** o~u ko~uwa ° ńßananaj itini i tajwan ,o~u kananaman to~u no~u mita ami kaka…ôn, paŇčaŇčan sako~u tiri…¨~…ģaj to~u ŇčaŇčan i " ¶ari ¶a papaja" ńßananaj, a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u ŇčaŇčan no~u ko~uwa ° to~u masamaamaa:naj , so~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u mafana °aj ami kinkiwaj to~u ko~uwa ° i , o~uka …ĺa…ĺaj…ĺaj no~u ko~uwa ° i, i °ajaw aitiniaj i timo~u…ĺaj fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôtaj amirika saan, aitini i **s…ô ¶i(****) ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u a mapa…ĺakat ami …ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ tajra i into~uaj a kanatar, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u a tajniaj to~u i ja ¶o~uta…ĺo~u ato~u itini i fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôtaj a ka…ĺo~u-niaro~u, ano~u itini to~u i inni a ¶a i fi…ĺipin ato~u tajwan , o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw i tajwan i, °ajaw no~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan i, i…ĺaaj to~u ama ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ko~u pakajniaj i ko~uwa ° sanaj, sanaw mataf…ôsiwaj to~u ko~u *** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u ko~uwa ° a ma …ĺ…ôŇčaw itini i tajwan. …ĺiko~usato~u a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~uka pifa…ĺi ¶ ami sa…ĺo~uma to~u sapa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa ° , faŇč ¶a…ĺaj to~u pa…ĺo~uma…ôn ńßa…ĺakamkamaj to~u ama r…ôŇčaw , Ňča °ajaj to~u a misamińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan a pa…ĺo~uma ato~u ¶ińß…ô ¶i, sanaw itini to~u ko~usakaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u ko~uwa ° ama r…ônnak, itija sato~u ama po~u…ĺo~uŇč tajra i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa no~u pa…ĺa i tajwan, ano~u …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u…ôn ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan i, o~u ko~uwa °, o~urana* a tajno~uŇč * ko~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan. masamaanaj ko~u ko~uwa °. ******* o~u ko~uwa ° ńßananaj i, matija o~u ki…ĺaŇč ko~u pisa °o~usi ¶i…ĺaan, sa °ajaw i naitiraaj i fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôtaj to~uno~u ami…ĺika a kanatar ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u a masa…¨~…ģak, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u itini i °ajaw no~u mińß…ô ¶aan i naitini i taj…ĺio~uk ama pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ a tajni i tajwan , nawńßani ¶a…ĺaj a kaka…ôn…ôn, ńßati…ĺaaj ko~u o~u…ĺańß no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ami papa…ĺo~uma. …ĺo~umasato~u ka…ĺa ijo~ufo~uŇčaj a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u tanpaj ¶…ô ato~u ¶…ôfaŇč ato~u taŇč a ¶a o~u kaŇčo~u ¶…ô ato~u b~vitamin ni…ĺa, mipa…¨~…ģaŇčaj to~u fito~uka ami i…ĺaŇč to~u kaka…ôn…ôn, so~u °…ĺinaj ko~ukafaŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u ko~uwa ° saan. nikao~u…ĺira o~u ko~uwa ° ńßananaj i, iraaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira, iraaj ko~u fafańßian a ko~uwa ° iraaj ko~u fa °inajan ato~u matat…ôko~uaj to~u fafańßian ato~u fa °inajan a ko~uwa °, o~u fafańßian a ko~uwa ° i mato~u °as ¶ira ¶ifa…ĺo~uaj ¶i ńßanaaj, …ĺiko~ursato~u o~u ka ¶ińßana nira ¶aaj ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i ¶ira, sanaw iraaj ko~u pipararamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~uwa ° tija ma…ĺo~ufa ¶ ka…ĺańß…ô ¶i ko~u ko~uwa °, sanaw imatini a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~upi saŇča ° to~u sapa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa ° ira ko~u …ĺ…ôss…ôn ato~u so~u~u…ĺo~u *. ,tajno~uŇč*.*.*. *.(***,*,*,**), ńßananaj. sama…ôn…ôŇč ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa °.*******. *. o~u pisasapa…ĺ to~u sapa…ĺo~uma: ta…ĺa °ajaw no~upipa…ĺo~umaan i, mi…ĺi °ajaw ńßo~u ami sasapar, o~u ta…¨~…ģafo~uŇč ¶a…ĺ apipa…ĺo~umaan i, itira i …ĺiko~ur no~u kafa…ĺijo~usan, tija ¶aaj kaka…ĺian no~u fa…ĺijas ko~u r…ôŇčaw nira, arat…ôk itini i sakasiwa taŇčasa i ¶…ô ¶…ôj po~u…ĺo~u ° irako~u ¶…ô ¶aj a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģan no~u mińß…ô ¶aan, tańßpo~u…ôn to~u fajfaj to~u sapi…¨~…ģipo~utaw to~u r…ôŇčaw nira tija ¶aaj ko~u ka…ĺi °aŇč no~u fao~u, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč taŇčasa i sakato~usa a mińß…ô ¶aan to~u saka …ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģan, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ko~u to~u °as nira, o~u pisaki…ĺa ¶an to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma. *. miso~uŇčira ami pa…ĺo~uma: mikaŇčkaŇč ami so~uŇčira ° to~u pi pa…ĺo~umaan a o~umańß, mifo~u…ĺasiw ami pataj to~u r…ôŇčo~us, misa °apo~u…ĺaw to~u so~uta ° ami sa…ĺo~uis…ĺo~uis, irako~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u ka…ĺo~umakatan no~u nano~um, mańß…ô…ĺ…ôk to~uńßaw i, mińßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj to~u ami patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ ami pa…ĺo~uma, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ nira i, ma Ē…ôŇč *-*.* no~u ko~uŇč ¶iw , ano~u Ňča °ajaj i sa…ĺiwaŇč…ĺiwaŇč…ôŇč ami pa…ĺo~uma, tija matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ nira, faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~uka to~u °as nira , faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~upi pa…ĺaŇč…ĺa ato~u mita…ĺijo~uk ami °a…¨~…ģip…ôr to~u saka ¶aaw ka ijo~uf no~u tatiińßaj fa…ĺi. *. mipi…ĺo~uńß ami pa…ĺo~uma: nawńßani taka…ĺawaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, ano~u ¶aaj ka pi…ĺo~uńß…ôn i, ¶aaj ka …ĺawis ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira a siwkak…ôn, sanaw ano~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u to~u °as nira i, pi…ĺo~uńß…ôn to~u mamaŇč ato~u paso~uta °…ôn ko~u tapaŇčan nira to~usaka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u r…ôŇčaw nira, marao~u…¨~…ģ ko~u to~usa a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mi…ĺijaw ńßa ¶a to~u sakato~usa apipi…ĺo~uńß to~usaka po~u Ē…ôn…ô…ĺ nira, ato~u paso~uta ° ńßa ¶a to~u tapaŇčan to~usaka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, ano~u *a °ajaj i tańß…ôpo~u…ôn to~u fa…ĺajsaj to~u saka °…ô ¶aaw ka ¶i fao~u nira. *. o~u piso~u…ĺim…ô…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u o~umańß: ano~u ¶aaj ka so~u…ĺim…ô…¨~…ģ…ôn ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u ko~uwa ° i, mi…ĺi °ajaw ko~u s…ômo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u …ĺ…ôŇčo~us ami ka…ĺiŇčan to~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, sanaw sa…ĺija…ĺijaw…ôn ami so~u…ĺim…ô…¨~…ģ ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u o~umańß, ato~u mipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u so~uta ° , tija faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, tija ma…ĺo~ufi ¶ to~u ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶i nira. *. mipitpit to~u tatiińßaj a ¶a °aŇč no~u ko~uwa °: jamato~u °as to~u ko~u ko~uwa ° i, iraaj ko~u ka ¶i ¶a °aŇč nira to~u ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ a ¶a °aŇč, o~u …ĺanaŇč i awaaj ko~u Ē…ôpo~u ¶ to~u to~u °as no~u ko~uwa ° , sanaw pa…¨~…ģpa ¶…ôn ami pitpit ko~u ńßatiraaj a ¶a °aŇč nira. *. o~u pipa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ńßana o~u ko~uwa °: ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~uka ¶ińßanaan no~u ko~uwa ° i, iraaj ami …ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u °a ¶a ¶…ôna…ĺ ato~u °a…¨~…ģipaŇčpaŇč ami …ĺiŇč…ĺiŇč to~u ńßana no~u ko~uwa °, o~uranaŇč i o~umi pa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u saka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °, …ĺo~umasato~u o~u mafana °aj o~uma …ĺa…ĺo~ukaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u no~u tam…¨~…ģawaj ko~u saka pa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~uwa °, tija i…ĺaaj ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u…ĺa ko~uwa °. *. mipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u so~uta °: nawńßani o~uno~u ka ¶ińß…ô…ĺaŇčan ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶ian no~u ko~uwa °, to~una ta…ĺa °ajaw a ¶ińß…ô ¶i ko~u ko~uwa ° i, i…ĺaaj ko~u pi patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u so~uta ° to~uka …ĺ…ôŇčawan nira, ano~u mataf…ôsiw to~u ko~u °i ¶aŇč no~u so~uta ° i, ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, ¶aajaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶i nira, sanaw ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ko~uka pipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u ka…ĺ…ôŇčawan nira i, iraaj to~u ko~uka faŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °. *. o~u pipatajńßi to~u tapaŇčan no~u ko~uwa °: ano~u mipa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa ° i, nano~umamaŇčan nira, irasa ¶a ko~u pi po~u…ĺijaw ato~u patajńßi to~u r…ôŇčaw ato~u to~u °as no~u ko~uwa °, i…ĺaaj ko~uno~u ko~uwa ° atato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a po~u…ĺijaw, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~u to~u °as no~u ko~uwa ° , ira sańß ¶a ko~upi patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ami ńßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj ami pato~uo~u…ĺ to~u po~u…ĺijaw to~u tapaŇčan nira, iraaj ko~u saka ¶ipapańß a po~u…ĺijaw, iraaj ko~u saka ¶ińß…ô ¶i nira a po~u…ĺijaw, ano~u mafanna ° ami sa °o~usi to~u …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ apato~uo~u…ĺ to~u po~u…ĺijaw i, o~u fafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw ato~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °. *. ma…ĺaro~uk ami …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģimaw to~u o~umańß: nawńßani taka…ĺawaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, sanaw ano~u ¶aaj ka …ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģimaw i, ano~u tataŇčan ko~u fa…ĺi ami ijo~uf, ranikajaj ama pi…ĺo~uńß ko~u ko~uwa °, sanaw mi ¶o~upi to~u sa ¶o~uk…ôr, ano~u irako~u mapi…ĺo~uńßaj i, taŇčso~u…ĺin ami ¶o~uk…ôr, ro~umasato~u ano~u ira ko~u mika…ĺi °aŇčaj to~u ko~uwa ° a fao~u, ano~u o~u fo~uńß…ôt to~u ano~u o~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u ami kaka…ôn to~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °, taŇčso~u…ĺ…ôn ami …ĺap…ĺap, sanaw ira to~uko~u ka…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami …ĺiso~u to~u o~umańß no~u ko~uwa °. o~u …ĺiko~ur to~u no~u taja…ĺ to~u ko~uwa °. ****** imatini o~u ko~uwa ° i tini i tajwan, o~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan i o~ura "tajno~uŇč *" ano~u masańß…ôto~uaj to~uja inian a ko~uwa °an i, ¶aaj ka Ňčaaj, a…ĺat…ôk ¶aaj ka ¶akat o~u °a ¶a nira, ano~u a…ĺapa…ĺo~uma sa to~uranan a ko~uwa °, nawńßani …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj fa ¶a…ĺaj pa…ĺo~uma…ôn ko~u ńßatiraaj a ko~uwa °, ro~umasato~u o~u…ĺanan a ko~uwa ° i, matat…ôko~uaj to~u fa °inajan ato~u fafańßian, sanaw …ĺanikajaj a ¶ińß…ô ¶i ¶iŇčra, nikao~u…ĺira imatini iraaj to~u ko~uja "tajno~uŇč * " ńßananaj a spa…ĺo~uma, o~u…ĺanan a fa Ē…ĺo~uńßaj a sapa…ĺo~uma, faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira , matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ko~u katata °aŇč no~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj a misaa…¨~…ģińßaj ami pa…ĺo~uma, o~unianto~u ko~u Ňča °ajaj a pa…ĺo~uma Ē…ôn.(siwko~u…ĺan paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis so~u~uman ****/**/**) tańßapinanaŇč****: *. ***(****-**-**)
S.FORM: == Kowa'śú®Áďú == O kalokowa' i TaywanśúČťóúŚŹįÁĀ£śú®Áďú O kowa' hananay itini i Taywan ,o kananaman to no mita ami kakaen, pangangan sako tiriday to ngangan i "Carica papaya" hananay, adihayay ko ngangan no kowa' to masamaamaa:nay , sowal sa ko mafana'ay ami kinkiway to kowa' i , oka lalaylay no kowa' i, I'ayaw aitiniay i timolay fa^detay Amirika saan, aitini i 17seci(17šłĖÁīÄ) ami salingato a mapalakat ami lalad tayra i Intoay a kanatar, dodosato a tayniay to i Yacotalo ato itini i fa^detay a kalo-niaro, ano itini to i Inni aca i Filipin ato Taywan , o sowal no mafana'ay to tilid a tamdaw i Taywan i, 'ayaw no 1685 a mihecaan i, ilaay to ama tilid ko pakayniay i kowa' sanay, sanaw matafesiway to ko 300 a mihecaan ko kowa' a ma lengaw itini i Taywan. Likosato adihay to koka pifalic ami saloma to sapaloma to kowa' , fangcalay to palomaen halakamkamay to ama rengaw , nga'ayay to a misamihecahecaan a paloma ato ciheci, sanaw itini to kosakaadihay no kowa' ama rennak, itiya sato ama polong tayra icowacowa no pala i Taywan, ano dodoen ko tilid to 2017 a mihecaan i, o polong ama palomaay to kowa' a sela i, pakaalaay to 2,563 Kongcin ko mapalomaay to kowa' , ato ira ko 125,521 Konton koka adihay no kaleteng no kowa', oranag a taynong 2 ko saadihayay ami palomaan. Masamaanay ko kowa'. śúČťóúśú®ÁďúÁöĄśú¨Ť≥™ O kowa' hananay i, matiya o kilang ko pisa'osi cilaan, sa'ayaw i naitiraay i fa^detay tono Amilika a kanatar ami salingato a masadak, dodosato itini i 'ayaw no mihecaan i naitini i Tayliok ama pacomod a tayni i Taywan , nawhani lahodayay fangcalay paloma^en, kalamkamay a mato'as, halafingnay a ci heci, kalaheciay sanaw olahay saan ko tamtamdaw ami papaloma to kowa', marao-fangcalay a kakaenen, hatilaay ko olah no tamdaw ami papaloma. Lomasato kala iyofongay adihayay ko tanpayce ato cefang ato tang aca o kangoce ato vitamin nila, mipadangay to fitoka ami ilang to kakaenen, so'linay kokafangcal no kowa' saan. Nikaolira o kowa' hananay i, iraay ko kasasiloma nira, iraay ko fafahian a kowa' iraay ko fa'inayan ato matatekoay to fafahian ato fa'inayan a kowa', o fafahian a kowa' i mato'as cira cifaloay ci hanaay, likorsato malofic ko heci nira, yama tatekoay to fa'inayan ato fafahian a kowa' i, hatiyaay to aci falo to hana tiya ciheci cira, 'edeng sa o fa'inayan a kowa' i, o kacihana nira caay ka ciheci cira, sanaw iraay ko pipararamod to kowa' tiya malofac kalaheci ko kowa', sanaw imatini adihayay kopi sanga' to sapaloma to kowa' ira ko lessen ato sulo 1. ,Taynong1.2.3. 5.(ŚŹįŤĺ≤1,2,3,5Ťôü), hananay. Samaeneng ami paloma to kowa'.Ť¶ĀŚ¶āšĹēÁ®ģś§ćśú®Áďú. 1. O pisasapal to sapaloma: Tala'ayaw nopipalomaan i, mili'ayaw ho ami sasapar, o tadafongcal apipalomaan i, itira i likor no kafaliyosan, tiya caay kakalian no faliyas ko rengaw nira, aratek itini i sakasiwa tangasa i cecey polo' irako cecay a foladan no mihecaan, tahpoen to fayfay to sapidipotaw to rengaw nira tiya caay ko kali'ang no fao, ma^deng tangasa i sakatosa a mihecaan to saka lima a foladan, ma^deng to ko to'as nira, o pisakilacan to ami paloma. 2. Misongira ami paloma: Mikangkang ami songira' to pi palomaan a omah, mifolasiw ami patay to rengos, misa'apolaw to sota' ami saloislois, irako todongay o kalomakatan no nanom, mahelek tohaw i, mihacecacecay to ami patatodong to la^ed ami paloma, o cecay no la^ed nira i, ma^eng 2-2.5 no kongciw , ano nga'ayay i saliwangliwangeng ami paloma, tiya matatodong ko la^ed nira, fangcal koka to'as nira , fangcal kopi palangla ato mitaliyok ami 'adiper to sakacaaw ka iyof no tatiihay fali. 3. Mipiloh ami paloma: Nawhani takalaway ko lengaw no kowa', ano caay ka pilohen i, caay ka lawis ko heci nira a siwkaken, sanaw ano matatodong ko to'as nira i, pilohen to mamang ato pasota'en ko tapangan nira tosaka tanektek no rengaw nira, maraod ko tosa a folad, miliyaw haca to sakatosa apipiloh tosaka po^enel nira, ato pasota' haca to tapangan tosaka tanektek no lengaw nira, ano ga'ayay i tahepoen to falaysay to saka'ecaaw ka ci fao nira. 4. O pisolimed to laloma' no omah: Ano caay ka solimeden ko laloma' no pipalomaan to kowa' i, mili'ayaw ko semod ato lengos ami kalingan to lengaw no kowa', sanaw saliyaliyawen ami solimed ko laloma' no omah, ato mipatatodong to cepa' no sota' , tiya fangcal to ko lengaw nira, tiya malofic to koka ciheci nira. 5. Mipitpit to tatiihay a ca'ang no kowa': Yamato'as to ko kowa' i, iraay ko kacica'ang nira to caay kafangcal a ca'ang, o lanang i awaay ko ^epoc to to'as no kowa' , sanaw padpacen ami pitpit ko hatiraay a ca'ang nira. 6. O pipalalamod to hana o kowa': Malawod koka cihanaan no kowa' i, iraay ami lawod ko 'acacenal ato 'adipangpang ami lingling to hana no kowa', oranang i omi palalamoday to sakaciheci no kowa', lomasato o mafana'ay oma lalokay a tamdaw i, o no tamdaway ko saka palalamod to kowa', tiya ilaay koka ciheci nola kowa'. 7. Mipatatodong to cepa' no sota': Nawhani ono kacihelangan koka cihecian no kowa', tona tala'ayaw a ciheci ko kowa' i, ilaay ko pi patatodong to cepa' no sota' toka lengawan nira, ano matafesiw to ko 'icang no sota' i, caay kafangcal ko lengaw no kowa', caayay ka fangcal koka ciheci nira, sanaw ano malalid koka pipatatodong to cepa' no kalengawan nira i, iraay to koka fangcal no ka ciheci no kowa'. 8. O pipatayhi to tapangan no kowa': Ano mipaloma to kowa' i, nanomamangan nira, irasaca ko pi poliyaw ato patayhi to rengaw ato to'as no kowa', ilaay kono kowa' atatodong a poliyaw, ma^deng ko to'as no kowa' , ira sahca kopi patatodong ami hacecacecay ami patool to poliyaw to tapangan nira, iraay ko sakacipapah a poliyaw, iraay ko sakaciheci nira a poliyaw, ano mafanna' ami sa'osi to lomi'ad apatool to poliyaw i, o fafangcal ko lengaw ato kaciheci no kowa'. 9. Malarok ami dadimaw to omah: Nawhani takalaway ko lengaw no kowa', sanaw ano caay ka lalid ami dadimaw i, ano tatangan ko fali ami iyof, ranikayay ama piloh ko kowa', sanaw micopi to sacoker, ano irako mapilohay i, tangsolin ami coker, romasato ano ira ko mikali'angay to kowa' a fao, ano o fohet to ano o 'edo to ami kakaen to kaciheci no kowa', tangsolen ami laplap, sanaw ira toko kalalid ami liso to omah no kowa'. O likor to no tayal to kowa'. śú™šĺÜśé®ŚĽ£Ś∑•šĹú Imatini o kowa' i tini i Taywan, o saadihayay ami palomaan i ora "taynong 2" ano masahetoay toya inian a kowa'an i, caay ka ngaay, alatek caay kacakat o 'aca nira, ano alapaloma sa toranan a kowa', nawhani lahodayay facalay palomaen ko hatiraay a kowa', romasato olanan a kowa' i, matatekoay to fa'inayan ato fafahian, sanaw lanikayay a ciheci cingra, nikaolira imatini iraay to koya "Taynong 6 " hananay a spaloma, olanan a fa^lohay a sapaloma, fangcalay ko heci nira , matatodongay ko katata'ang no heci nira, tadafangcalay a misaadihay ami paloma, onianto ko nga'ayay a paloma^en.(Siwkolan Pangcah/'Amis Suman 2024/03/15) TahapinanangŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô: 1. Áē™śú®Áďú(2009-02-24)
S.PHON: == ko~uwa °** == o~u ka…ĺo~uko~uwa ° i tajwan****** o~u ko~uwa ° ńßananaj itini i tajwan ,o~u kananaman to~u no~u mita ami kaka…ôn, paŇčaŇčan sako~u tiri…¨~…ģaj to~u ŇčaŇčan i " ¶ari ¶a papaja" ńßananaj, a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u ŇčaŇčan no~u ko~uwa ° to~u masamaamaa:naj , so~uwa…ĺ sa ko~u mafana °aj ami kinkiwaj to~u ko~uwa ° i , o~uka …ĺa…ĺaj…ĺaj no~u ko~uwa ° i, i °ajaw aitiniaj i timo~u…ĺaj fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôtaj amirika saan, aitini i **s…ô ¶i(****) ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u a mapa…ĺakat ami …ĺa…ĺa…¨~…ģ tajra i into~uaj a kanatar, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u a tajniaj to~u i ja ¶o~uta…ĺo~u ato~u itini i fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôtaj a ka…ĺo~u-niaro~u, ano~u itini to~u i inni a ¶a i fi…ĺipin ato~u tajwan , o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u mafana °aj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ a tam…¨~…ģaw i tajwan i, °ajaw no~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan i, i…ĺaaj to~u ama ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ko~u pakajniaj i ko~uwa ° sanaj, sanaw mataf…ôsiwaj to~u ko~u *** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u ko~uwa ° a ma …ĺ…ôŇčaw itini i tajwan. …ĺiko~usato~u a…¨~…ģińßaj to~u ko~uka pifa…ĺi ¶ ami sa…ĺo~uma to~u sapa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa ° , faŇč ¶a…ĺaj to~u pa…ĺo~uma…ôn ńßa…ĺakamkamaj to~u ama r…ôŇčaw , Ňča °ajaj to~u a misamińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶aan a pa…ĺo~uma ato~u ¶ińß…ô ¶i, sanaw itini to~u ko~usakaa…¨~…ģińßaj no~u ko~uwa ° ama r…ônnak, itija sato~u ama po~u…ĺo~uŇč tajra i ¶o~uwa ¶o~uwa no~u pa…ĺa i tajwan, ano~u …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~u…ôn ko~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan i, o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč ama pa…ĺo~umaaj to~u ko~uwa ° a s…ô…ĺa i, pakaa…ĺaaj to~u *,*** ko~uŇč ¶in ko~u mapa…ĺo~umaaj to~u ko~uwa ° , ato~u ira ko~u ***,*** ko~unto~un ko~uka a…¨~…ģińßaj no~u ka…ĺ…ôt…ôŇč no~u ko~uwa °, o~urana* a tajno~uŇč * ko~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan. masamaanaj ko~u ko~uwa °. ******* o~u ko~uwa ° ńßananaj i, matija o~u ki…ĺaŇč ko~u pisa °o~usi ¶i…ĺaan, sa °ajaw i naitiraaj i fa Ē…¨~…ģ…ôtaj to~uno~u ami…ĺika a kanatar ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u a masa…¨~…ģak, …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u itini i °ajaw no~u mińß…ô ¶aan i naitini i taj…ĺio~uk ama pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ a tajni i tajwan , nawńßani …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj faŇč ¶a…ĺaj pa…ĺo~uma Ē…ôn, ka…ĺamkamaj a mato~u °as, ńßa…ĺafiŇčnaj a ¶i ńß…ô ¶i, ka…ĺańß…ô ¶iaj sanaw o~u…ĺańßaj saan ko~u tamtam…¨~…ģaw ami papa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa °, marao~u-faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a kaka…ôn…ôn, ńßati…ĺaaj ko~u o~u…ĺańß no~u tam…¨~…ģaw ami papa…ĺo~uma. …ĺo~umasato~u ka…ĺa ijo~ufo~uŇčaj a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~u tanpaj ¶…ô ato~u ¶…ôfaŇč ato~u taŇč a ¶a o~u kaŇčo~u ¶…ô ato~u b~vitamin ni…ĺa, mipa…¨~…ģaŇčaj to~u fito~uka ami i…ĺaŇč to~u kaka…ôn…ôn, so~u °…ĺinaj ko~ukafaŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u ko~uwa ° saan. nikao~u…ĺira o~u ko~uwa ° ńßananaj i, iraaj ko~u kasasi…ĺo~uma nira, iraaj ko~u fafańßian a ko~uwa ° iraaj ko~u fa °inajan ato~u matat…ôko~uaj to~u fafańßian ato~u fa °inajan a ko~uwa °, o~u fafańßian a ko~uwa ° i mato~u °as ¶ira ¶ifa…ĺo~uaj ¶i ńßanaaj, …ĺiko~ursato~u ma…ĺo~ufi ¶ ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, jama tat…ôko~uaj to~u fa °inajan ato~u fafańßian a ko~uwa ° i, ńßatijaaj to~u a ¶i fa…ĺo~u to~u ńßana tija ¶ińß…ô ¶i ¶ira, °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇč sa o~u fa °inajan a ko~uwa ° i, o~u ka ¶ińßana nira ¶aaj ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i ¶ira, sanaw iraaj ko~u pipararamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~uwa ° tija ma…ĺo~ufa ¶ ka…ĺańß…ô ¶i ko~u ko~uwa °, sanaw imatini a…¨~…ģińßajaj ko~upi saŇča ° to~u sapa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa ° ira ko~u …ĺ…ôss…ôn ato~u so~u~u…ĺo~u *. ,tajno~uŇč*.*.*. *.(***,*,*,**), ńßananaj. sama…ôn…ôŇč ami pa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa °.*******. *. o~u pisasapa…ĺ to~u sapa…ĺo~uma: ta…ĺa °ajaw no~upipa…ĺo~umaan i, mi…ĺi °ajaw ńßo~u ami sasapar, o~u ta…¨~…ģafo~uŇč ¶a…ĺ apipa…ĺo~umaan i, itira i …ĺiko~ur no~u kafa…ĺijo~usan, tija ¶aaj kaka…ĺian no~u fa…ĺijas ko~u r…ôŇčaw nira, arat…ôk itini i sakasiwa taŇčasa i ¶…ô ¶…ôj po~u…ĺo~u ° irako~u ¶…ô ¶aj a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģan no~u mińß…ô ¶aan, tańßpo~u…ôn to~u fajfaj to~u sapi…¨~…ģipo~utaw to~u r…ôŇčaw nira tija ¶aaj ko~u ka…ĺi °aŇč no~u fao~u, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč taŇčasa i sakato~usa a mińß…ô ¶aan to~u saka …ĺima a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģan, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč to~u ko~u to~u °as nira, o~u pisaki…ĺa ¶an to~u ami pa…ĺo~uma. *. miso~uŇčira ami pa…ĺo~uma: mikaŇčkaŇč ami so~uŇčira ° to~u pi pa…ĺo~umaan a o~umańß, mifo~u…ĺasiw ami pataj to~u r…ôŇčo~us, misa °apo~u…ĺaw to~u so~uta ° ami sa…ĺo~uis…ĺo~uis, irako~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj o~u ka…ĺo~umakatan no~u nano~um, mańß…ô…ĺ…ôk to~uńßaw i, mińßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj to~u ami patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ ami pa…ĺo~uma, o~u ¶…ô ¶aj no~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ nira i, ma Ē…ôŇč *-*.* no~u ko~uŇč ¶iw , ano~u Ňča °ajaj i sa…ĺiwaŇč…ĺiwaŇč…ôŇč ami pa…ĺo~uma, tija matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u …ĺa Ē…ô…¨~…ģ nira, faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~uka to~u °as nira , faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~upi pa…ĺaŇč…ĺa ato~u mita…ĺijo~uk ami °a…¨~…ģip…ôr to~u saka ¶aaw ka ijo~uf no~u tatiińßaj fa…ĺi. *. mipi…ĺo~uńß ami pa…ĺo~uma: nawńßani taka…ĺawaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, ano~u ¶aaj ka pi…ĺo~uńß…ôn i, ¶aaj ka …ĺawis ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira a siwkak…ôn, sanaw ano~u matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ko~u to~u °as nira i, pi…ĺo~uńß…ôn to~u mamaŇč ato~u paso~uta °…ôn ko~u tapaŇčan nira to~usaka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u r…ôŇčaw nira, marao~u…¨~…ģ ko~u to~usa a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mi…ĺijaw ńßa ¶a to~u sakato~usa apipi…ĺo~uńß to~usaka po~u Ē…ôn…ô…ĺ nira, ato~u paso~uta ° ńßa ¶a to~u tapaŇčan to~usaka tan…ôkt…ôk no~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, ano~u *a °ajaj i tańß…ôpo~u…ôn to~u fa…ĺajsaj to~u saka °…ô ¶aaw ka ¶i fao~u nira. *. o~u piso~u…ĺim…ô…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u o~umańß: ano~u ¶aaj ka so~u…ĺim…ô…¨~…ģ…ôn ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u pipa…ĺo~umaan to~u ko~uwa ° i, mi…ĺi °ajaw ko~u s…ômo~u…¨~…ģ ato~u …ĺ…ôŇčo~us ami ka…ĺiŇčan to~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, sanaw sa…ĺija…ĺijaw…ôn ami so~u…ĺim…ô…¨~…ģ ko~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u o~umańß, ato~u mipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u so~uta ° , tija faŇč ¶a…ĺ to~u ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw nira, tija ma…ĺo~ufi ¶ to~u ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶i nira. *. mipitpit to~u tatiińßaj a ¶a °aŇč no~u ko~uwa °: jamato~u °as to~u ko~u ko~uwa ° i, iraaj ko~u ka ¶i ¶a °aŇč nira to~u ¶aaj kafaŇč ¶a…ĺ a ¶a °aŇč, o~u …ĺanaŇč i awaaj ko~u Ē…ôpo~u ¶ to~u to~u °as no~u ko~uwa ° , sanaw pa…¨~…ģpa ¶…ôn ami pitpit ko~u ńßatiraaj a ¶a °aŇč nira. *. o~u pipa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ńßana o~u ko~uwa °: ma…ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~uka ¶ińßanaan no~u ko~uwa ° i, iraaj ami …ĺawo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u °a ¶a ¶…ôna…ĺ ato~u °a…¨~…ģipaŇčpaŇč ami …ĺiŇč…ĺiŇč to~u ńßana no~u ko~uwa °, o~uranaŇč i o~umi pa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģaj to~u saka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °, …ĺo~umasato~u o~u mafana °aj o~uma …ĺa…ĺo~ukaj a tam…¨~…ģaw i, o~u no~u tam…¨~…ģawaj ko~u saka pa…ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~uwa °, tija i…ĺaaj ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u…ĺa ko~uwa °. *. mipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u so~uta °: nawńßani o~uno~u ka ¶ińß…ô…ĺaŇčan ko~uka ¶ińß…ô ¶ian no~u ko~uwa °, to~una ta…ĺa °ajaw a ¶ińß…ô ¶i ko~u ko~uwa ° i, i…ĺaaj ko~u pi ¶ińß…ô ¶i nira, sanaw ano~u ma…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ko~uka pipatato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ¶…ôpa ° no~u ka…ĺ…ôŇčawan nira i, iraaj to~u ko~uka faŇč ¶a…ĺ no~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °. *. o~u pipatajńßi to~u tapaŇčan no~u ko~uwa °: ano~u mipa…ĺo~uma to~u ko~uwa ° i, nano~umamaŇčan nira, irasa ¶a ko~u pi po~u…ĺijaw ato~u patajńßi to~u r…ôŇčaw ato~u to~u °as no~u ko~uwa °, i…ĺaaj ko~uno~u ko~uwa ° atato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč a po~u…ĺijaw, ma Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇč ko~u to~u °as no~u ko~uwa ° , ira sańß ¶a ko~upi patato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ami ńßa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj ami pato~uo~u…ĺ to~u po~u…ĺijaw to~u tapaŇčan nira, iraaj ko~u saka ¶ipapańß a po~u…ĺijaw, iraaj ko~u saka ¶ińß…ô ¶i nira a po~u…ĺijaw, ano~u mafanna ° ami sa °o~usi to~u …ĺo~umi °a…¨~…ģ apato~uo~u…ĺ to~u po~u…ĺijaw i, o~u fafaŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw ato~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °. *. ma…ĺaro~uk ami …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģimaw to~u o~umańß: nawńßani taka…ĺawaj ko~u …ĺ…ôŇčaw no~u ko~uwa °, sanaw ano~u ¶aaj ka …ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģimaw i, ano~u tataŇčan ko~u fa…ĺi ami ijo~uf, ranikajaj ama pi…ĺo~uńß ko~u ko~uwa °, sanaw mi ¶o~upi to~u sa ¶o~uk…ôr, ano~u irako~u mapi…ĺo~uńßaj i, taŇčso~u…ĺin ami ¶o~uk…ôr, ro~umasato~u ano~u ira ko~u mika…ĺi °aŇčaj to~u ko~uwa ° a fao~u, ano~u o~u fo~uńß…ôt to~u ano~u o~u °…ô…¨~…ģo~u to~u ami kaka…ôn to~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶i no~u ko~uwa °, taŇčso~u…ĺ…ôn ami …ĺap…ĺap, sanaw ira to~uko~u ka…ĺa…ĺi…¨~…ģ ami …ĺiso~u to~u o~umańß no~u ko~uwa °. o~u …ĺiko~ur to~u no~u taja…ĺ to~u ko~uwa °. ****** imatini o~u ko~uwa ° i tini i tajwan, o~u saa…¨~…ģińßajaj ami pa…ĺo~umaan i o~ura "tajno~uŇč *" ano~u masańß…ôto~uaj to~uja inian a ko~uwa °an i, ¶aaj ka Ňčaaj, a…ĺat…ôk ¶aaj ka ¶akat o~u °a ¶a nira, ano~u a…ĺapa…ĺo~uma sa to~uranan a ko~uwa °, nawńßani …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj fa ¶a…ĺaj pa…ĺo~uma…ôn ko~u ńßatiraaj a ko~uwa °, ro~umasato~u o~u…ĺanan a ko~uwa ° i, matat…ôko~uaj to~u fa °inajan ato~u fafańßian, sanaw …ĺanikajaj a ¶ińß…ô ¶i ¶iŇčra, nikao~u…ĺira imatini iraaj to~u ko~uja "tajno~uŇč * " ńßananaj a spa…ĺo~uma, o~u…ĺanan a fa Ē…ĺo~uńßaj a sapa…ĺo~uma, faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ko~u ńß…ô ¶i nira , matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj ko~u katata °aŇč no~u ńß…ô ¶i nira, ta…¨~…ģafaŇč ¶a…ĺaj a misaa…¨~…ģińßaj ami pa…ĺo~uma, o~unianto~u ko~u Ňča °ajaj a pa…ĺo~uma Ē…ôn.(siwko~u…ĺan paŇč ¶ańß/ °amis so~u~uman ****/**/**) tańßapinanaŇč****: *. ***(****-**-**)
